effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits discard-entire-hand then draw-five and the going-first first-turn permission
effects.text:
If you go first, you may use this card during your first turn.

Discard your hand and draw 5 cards.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the during-own-turn Bench-entry trigger, Basic/non-Darkness filters, and exact two-counter placement
effects.formula_question: place 2 counters on each Basic non-Darkness Pokémon benched by a player during that player's turn
effects.text: Whenever any player puts a Basic non-{D} Pokémon onto their Bench during their turn, place 2 damage counters on that Pokémon.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the engine's exact branch: choose one Pokémon, then a second only when the first is Basic, yielding up to two Basic or one Evolution
effects.text: Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon or 1 Evolution Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the Active-holder damaged-by-opponent-attack trigger, even-if-KO persistence, twelve counters on the attacker, and success-gated self-discard
effects.text: If the Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent’s Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), put 12 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon. If you placed any damage counters in this way, discard this card.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the Mega Evolution Pokémon ex search, reveal, and shuffle
effects.text: Search your deck for a Mega Evolution Pokémon {ex}, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the Cynthia's-Pokémon holder gate and +70 effective maximum HP
effects.text: The Cynthia’s Pokémon this card is attached to gets +70 HP.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits same-turn Grass-to-Grass evolution permission and retained first-turn prohibition
effects.formula_question: legal Grass evolution pairs after relaxing only the entered-play-this-turn restriction
effects.text: Each player’s {G} Pokémon can evolve into {G} Pokémon during the turn they play those Pokémon, except during their first turn.

effects.change_from_current: the existing Tool bake exactly preserves -2 Retreat Cost with the normal zero floor

current_encoder.reason: current encoder represents only reviewed stat bakes

effects.text: The Retreat Cost of the Pokémon this card is attached to is {C}{C} less.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the once-per-player-turn Water-Active/Water-Bench switch
effects.text: Once during each player’s turn, that player may switch their Active {W} Pokémon with 1 of their Benched {W} Pokémon.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits drawing three cards
effects.text: Draw 3 cards.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits drawing three cards
effects.text: Draw 3 cards.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits full opponent-hand reveal and owner-selected up-to-two Item discard
effects.text: Your opponent reveals their hand, and you discard up to 2 Item cards you find there.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the own switch and success-gated draw-until-five count
effects.formula_question: if switch succeeds, draw max(0,5-current hand) cards
effects.text: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits once-per-turn Supporter-history-gated healing of 10 from every own Pokémon
effects.formula_question: 10 healing capped by current damage for each own Pokémon when activation is legal
effects.text: Once during each player’s turn, if they played a Supporter card from their hand this turn, they may heal 10 damage from each of their Pokémon.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the opponent Basic-Bench gust and Confusion on the new Active
effects.text: Switch in 1 of your opponent’s Benched Basic Pokémon to the Active Spot. If you do, the new Active Pokémon is now Confused.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits immediate recovery and continuing Special-Condition immunity for every Pokémon with attached Energy
effects.text: Each Pokémon that has any Energy attached (both yours and your opponent’s) recovers from all Special Conditions and can’t be affected by any Special Conditions.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits the Basic Psychic discard source and Psychic Bench target filters
effects.text: Attach a Basic {P} Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched {P} Pokémon.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits exact evolves-from matching, no-Ability filter, deck evolution, shuffle, and same-turn/setup timing exception
effects.formula_question: all legal target/evolution pairs after bypassing the normal entered-play timing restriction
effects.text: Search your deck for a card that has no Abilities and evolves from 1 of your Pokémon, and put it onto that Pokémon to evolve it. Then, shuffle your deck. You can use this card on a Pokémon you put down when you were setting up to play or on a Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits separately capped Stadium and Energy searches, reveal, and shuffle
effects.text: Search your deck for a Stadium card and an Energy card, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

effects.change_from_current: the current encoder omits top-seven inspection, independent Pokémon and Trainer selections, reveal, and rest-to-deck shuffle
effects.text: Look at the top 7 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Pokémon and a Trainer card you find there and put them into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.
